items.promptGlossEn: You do not need to reduce speed since a grade-separated crossing (overpass/underpass) is normally one-way.

topCandidates.prompt: As the traffic flow at an interchange is generally one-way, the vehicles do not have to reduce speed when passing.
topCandidates.syntheticJaPrompt: as traffic flow interchange generally one-way 車両 してはならない have 減速 when passing。
topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 교차로의 교통 흐름은 일반적으로 일방통행이므로 차량은 통과할 때 감속할 필요가 없다.

topCandidates.prompt: When reaching a sharp curve, the driver should reduce speed and drive on the right side so as to avoid colliding with the vehicle crossing the central line of the curve in the opposite direction.
topCandidates.syntheticJaPrompt: when reaching sharp curve 運転者 べき 減速 and drive right side so as avoid colliding 車両 crossing central line curve opposite direction。
topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 급커브 접근 시 반대편 차량이 중앙선을 침범할 수 있으므로 감속하고 우측으로 주행하여 충돌을 피해야 한다.

topCandidates.prompt: As the braking distance increases on a wet road in a rainy day, the driver should use the emergency brake as much as possible to reduce speed.

topCandidates.prompt: When driving at night, the driver should reduce speed and go forward if the vehicle coming in the opposite direction fails to turn off the high beam light. This is designed to prevent an accident from happening when there are pedestrians crossing the place where the lights of the two vehicles meet.
topCandidates.syntheticJaPrompt: when driving night 運転者 べき 減速 and go if 車両 coming opposite direction fail 消灯する high-beam ライト designed prevent accident happening when there pedestrian crossing place where ライト two 車両 meet。
topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 야간 운전 시 마주 오는 차량이 상향등을 끄지 않을 때에는 운전자는 감속하여 진행해야 한다. 이는 두 차량의 등빛이 겹치는 지점에서 보행자가 횡단할 경우 사고를 예방하기 위한 것이다.

topCandidates.prompt: According to rules on the road traffic safety, the maximum speed on the highway is less than 120km/hr, thus, it will not be in violation of the traffic regulations as long as the speed does not exceed 120km/hr on the highway.
topCandidates.syntheticJaPrompt: according rule road traffic safety max speed 高速道路 less than 120km hr thus it will not be violation traffic regulation as long as speed not exceed 120km hr 高速道路。
topCandidates.translatedPrompt: 도로교통안전 규정에 따르면 고속도로의 최고속도는 120km/h 미만이므로 고속도로에서 속도가 120km/h를 초과하지 않으면 교통법규 위반이 아니다.
